name: Adding evidence creates a ledger row and updates LOOP.md preview
description: When a builder adds a manual evidence entry, the new entry should appear in the ledger and be reflected in the generated LOOP.md preview.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the LoopLedger live app
In the evidence entry form, enter the title TestSprite smoke evidence
Enter the detail This entry proves the ledger form can capture manual evidence during the hackathon loop
Verify the ledger timeline shows TestSprite smoke evidence
Verify the LOOP.md live preview includes TestSprite smoke evidence
